config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mintlify Dashboard at https://dashboard.mintlify.com
2. Go to Settings > Organization > API Keys
3. Create a new admin API key (starts with 'mint_')
4. Copy the API Key and the Project ID shown on that page
5. Paste both values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: From Mintlify Dashboard > Settings > Organization > API Keys. Keys start with 'mint_'.

credentialFields.label: Project ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Mintlify Dashboard > Settings > Organization > API Keys page, listed next to the key.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Mintlify documentation platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Mintlify documentation access and team management
